item.title: Trump wants US energy to hit accelerator, producers prefer cruise control
item.description: Oil and gas producers at CERAWeek made it clear: there’s little else they can do to quickly steer more supplies to import-dependent Asia

item.title: Shell and Orsted defeat lawsuit from Musk’s X
item.description: Social media platform owned by world’s richest man and Trump ally sued renewables developers and multiple other companies for allegedly conspiring to boycott advertising on X

item.title: UK-listed player secures extension for 1.5 Tcf gas prospect
item.description: Europa OIl & Gas aims to use extension for further technical studies and to secure partner to advance development

item.title: Middle East war will intensify push for energy security and diversification: Baker Hughes CEO
item.description: Iran war disruptions will lead to ‘doubling down’ on supply security priorities, with diversification and gas‑led resilience key outcomes, Lorenzo Simonelli tells Upstream

item.title: Edison drops arbitration case against Venture Global
item.description: Two sides reach settlement agreement that calls for additional LNG cargoes to Italian utility

item.title: Aussie juniors make headway in Indonesia
item.description: Triangle Energy and Bass Oil eye expansion in Southeast Asian country

item.title: It’s official: Key contract for Indonesia gas project not awarded!
item.description: Conrad Asia Energy puts the record straight on Mako prize

item.title: Another Australian LNG facility taken out of action
item.description: Woodside Energy shuts in NWS project in wake of Cyclone Narelle

item.title: US to pause attacks on Iran’s energy infrastructure for 10 days: Trump
item.description: US president says halt came ‘as per Iranian government request’

item.title: Oil prices up on confusion over Iran peace talks
item.description: WTI rises 4%, Brent up 5% as uncertainty lingers over reported negotiations

item.title: FERC chair eyes faster timelines, ‘durable’ orders for gas projects
item.description: US regulator has shortened timeframe of environmental review process by 70 days, according to Laura Swett

item.title: Canada boasts of becoming 'energy superpower' to save Asian allies
item.description: Warmer ties between First Nations, government and developers clear path for energy export projects

item.title: Petrobras makes fresh pre-salt discovery in Campos basin
item.description: Company again did not disclose critical information about new find

item.title: Chevron-led development lifts earnings at Kazakhstan national oil player
item.description: Tengiz development contributed $791 million to KazMunayGaz earnings in 2025, a fifth more than in 2024

item.title: Middle East crisis proof US LNG exports don't disrupt domestic market, oil execs say
item.description: Henry Hub prices steady despite soaring gas prices in Europe and Asia and rising US LNG demand

item.title: Capricorn Energy posts $19m profit as Egypt concessions reshape outlook
item.description: The merged concession agreement is due to be ratified by the Egyptian Parliament by the end of June

item.title: Capricorn Energy boosts profits as Egypt concessions reshape outlook
item.description: Merged concession agreement due to be ratified by Egyptian Parliament by end of June

item.title: Shell-led joint venture awards engineering contract for work on LNG Canada project
item.description: FEED contract will support planning for a potential Phase 2 of Coastal GasLink pipeline which provides gas for LNG Canada project

item.title: UK operator completes acquisition of key offshore asset from TotalEnergies
item.description: Serica Energy completes acquisition of 40% operated interest in Greater Laggan Area from TotalEnergies

item.title: QatarEnergy suspends offshore contracting work amid rising security concerns
item.description: The company’s oil and gas operations have been significantly impacted amid the ongoing Middle East war

item.title: Inpex betting large on Aussie shale gas
item.description: Success in the Beetaloo could see a third train added at the Japanese operator's Ichthys LNG project

item.title: Santos temporarily shuts down flagship LNG project
item.description: Darwin LNG in Australia is out of action while technical glitches are remedied on Barossa FPSO

item.title: Australian offshore project FID postponed after disappointing drilling
item.description: Amplitude Energy’s ECSP hits the skids after Isabella gas wildcat deemed non-commercial

item.title: EPA leader: US needs stronger ties with Asian allies in need of energy supplies
item.description: US could invest in west coast infrastructure to send cargoes to Asia-Pacific, Lee Zeldin says

item.title: Permian basin water disposal storage becoming more constrained
item.description: ExxonMobil unconventional boss says subsurface disposal of produced water ‘cannot be comprehensive solution’

item.title: ‘Promote LNG capacity all over the world’, TotalEnergies’ Pouyanne tells Europe
item.description: Crisis in Iran is ‘systemic’, TotalEnergies CEO tells CERAWeek

item.title: ExxonMobil in Venezuela 'this week', says upstream chief
item.description: Dan Ammann: ‘There’s been some progress’ on changing investment environment in South American nation

item.title: Ukraine strikes another Russian oil export facility
item.description: Ukraine special forces confirm they targeted a condensate export terminal operated by Russia's largest independent gas producer Novatek

item.title: How oil exploration has changed its focus from spending to timelines
item.description: Executives at CERAWeek say timelines and partnerships are now top priorities

item.title: Cheniere eyes LNG for Asia as its terminals hit ‘maximum capacity’
item.description: Company working to speed up production from new liquefaction trains at Corpus Christi expansion: CEO Jack Fusco
